title: Gemini Spark updates: macOS launch, connected apps and more
gist: Google is pushing Gemini Spark from a chat window into an agentic desktop assistant on macOS that acts across local files and Google Workspace, adds native third-party app integrations (Canva, Dropbox, Instacart, OpenTable, Zillow Rentals) plus custom MCP support, and gains real-time topic monitoring. The macOS agent is gated behind the paid Google AI Ultra tier and US-only beta.

insights.claim: Google is moving Gemini Spark beyond the chat window into an agent that executes multi-step tasks directly across local desktop files and apps on macOS, such as auto-sorting PDFs in Downloads into folders.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Signals the assistant-to-agent transition is reaching the OS layer, putting Google in direct competition with Apple Intelligence and OpenAI/Anthropic desktop agents for control of the local file system.
insights.quote: Gemini Spark can now move beyond the chat window, and tackle the heavy lifting across your desktop files and apps.
insights.locator: Bring Gemini Spark to your Mac

insights.claim: Gemini Spark will soon allow users to trigger multi-step tasks on their Mac remotely from their phone, e.g. finding a sales report, extracting a revenue figure, and emailing it while the user is away.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Remote agent execution on a persistent desktop endpoint hints at always-on background compute demand and a new class of asynchronous, delegated workflows.
insights.quote: you can assign a multi-step task to Gemini Spark from your phone

insights.claim: The Gemini Spark macOS desktop agent launches as US-only Beta restricted to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over, tightly gating the most powerful capability behind the top paid tier.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Reserving agentic desktop features for the premium Ultra tier is a monetization lever to drive subscription upgrades and shows Google using capability gating rather than broad free rollout.
insights.quote: Gemini Spark for macOS is available in Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over, starting in the US.
insights.locator: Gemini Spark for macOS is available

insights.claim: Gemini Spark is adding native integrations with Canva, Dropbox, Instacart, OpenTable, and Zillow Rentals, plus Google Tasks and Google Keep, positioning it as a transactional hub that can design, order groceries, book tables, and reserve apartment tours.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Watch whether these connected apps become dependent on Gemini-driven traffic; the assistant increasingly intermediates the user relationship for consumer service apps.
insights.quote: We’re also launching integrations with Canva, Dropbox, Instacart, OpenTable and Zillow Rentals
insights.locator: Connect Gemini Spark to your favorite apps

insights.claim: Google is adding support for custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) in Gemini Spark, letting users connect arbitrary apps directly into the assistant.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Google adopting the Anthropic-originated MCP standard is a signal MCP is consolidating as the cross-vendor integration layer for AI agents, reducing lock-in and favoring MCP-native tooling.
insights.quote: We’re also rolling out support for custom Model Context Protocol (MCP), giving you the ability to connect your favorite apps directly into Spark
insights.locator: We’re also rolling out support for custom Model Context Protocol

insights.claim: Gemini Spark can now proactively monitor blogs, news sites, social media, finance, shopping, weather, sports and email, triggering actions like a detailed financial report when a stock crosses a set threshold.
insights.speaker: Adam Coimbra
insights.so_what: Proactive, event-triggered monitoring competes with dedicated alerting and finance apps and could siphon engagement away from browsers and standalone notification services.
insights.quote: you can ask Spark to send you a detailed financial report if a stock reaches a certain threshold
insights.locator: Stay up to date on topics in real time
